task_completion.description: Create an Epi Info 7 project named 'CohortRetention'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Epi Info 7 window is open with a project named 'CohortRetention' visible in the workspace, project explorer, or title bar.

task_completion.description: Import the baseline dataset into Epi Info
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Baseline_Jan2024.csv' file is loaded as a data source, visible via a READ command in the Classic Analysis program editor, or shown in the data dictionary/dashboard.

task_completion.description: Import or relate the follow-up dataset in Epi Info
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Followup_Jun2024.csv' file is loaded or linked, visible via a RELATE command, MERGE dialog, or listed as an active data source alongside the baseline data.

task_completion.description: Identify participants missing from the follow-up data
task_completion.visual_evidence: A SELECT command, query, or data filter applied in Epi Info showing logic to isolate records where follow-up data is missing (e.g., checking if the follow-up ParticipantID is null or missing).

task_completion.description: Export the list of lost participants to CallList.csv with specific columns
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog, WRITE command, or ROUTE OUT command in Epi Info specifying the output path 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Output\CallList.csv' and explicitly selecting the columns: ParticipantID, FirstName, LastName, and Phone.

integrity.description: The agent used Epi Info 7 to process the data rather than external scripts
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Epi Info 7 interface (Classic Analysis, Visual Dashboard, etc.) rather than terminal windows running Python, PowerShell, or other external data processing scripts.

integrity.description: The export file was generated by the application, not manually typed
integrity.visual_evidence: The CallList.csv file is created via an Epi Info export function, not by opening a text editor (like Notepad) and manually typing or pasting the results.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the software by using terminal commands to copy or create the final output
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal commands (like 'echo' or 'Copy-Item') used to directly construct the final CallList.csv file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires using Epi Info 7 to perform a 6-month retention analysis on synthetic cohort data. The output file must be exported to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Output\CallList.csv' and MUST contain exactly these columns: ParticipantID, FirstName, LastName, Phone. The verifier checks for a case-insensitive match of these column names.
